mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_file(
File_id,
serial_number, file, file_name, title, date, delete_flg, first_create_date, last_modified_date, last_modified_user ) VALUES(
#{fileId},
#{serialNumber}, #{file, typeHandler=fms.handler.FileTypeHandler}, #{fileName}, #{title}, #{date}, #{deleteFlg}, #{firstCreateDate}, #{lastModifiedDate}, #{lastModifiedUser} )
mapper.select: SELECT tFile.file_id, tFile.serial_number, mUser.user_name, mUser.user_id, tFile.title, tFile.date, tFile.file_name, tFile.version FROM t_file tFile LEFT OUTER JOIN t_join_user tJoinUser ON tFile.file_id = tJoinUser.file_id LEFT OUTER JOIN m_user mUser ON tJoinUser.user_id = mUser.user_id WHERE tFile.file_id = #{fileId} AND tFile.delete_flg = #{deleteFlg}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_join_user( file_id, user_id, first_create_date, last_modified_date, last_modified_user ) VALUES( #{fileId}, #{userId}, #{firstCreateDate}, #{lastModifiedDate}, #{lastModifiedUser} )
